visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind other cans.
A green soda can with white lettering, positioned in front and to the left of the water bottle.
A red soda can with white lettering, positioned in front and to the right of the water bottle.
A white can with purple and blue graphics on the far left.
A black soda can located between the white can and the green can.
A brown paper bag standing behind the drinks.

action_plan.explanation: Removing the green can that is blocking the front-left of the water bottle, providing access.
Removing the red can that is blocking the front-right of the water bottle.
The path to the mineral water is now clear, and it can be picked up.
